name: Sciue Sciue Titina's Move It! Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons salt (up to 3), plus fine sea salt (up to 3)
1 small hot red pepper or chili flakes, to taste
3 tablespoons coarsely chopped fresh basil (up to 4)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 5 to 6 quarts of water to a rolling boil.
2. Add 2 to 3 tablespoons salt and the spaghetti; cook until it offers considerable resistance, about three-quarters of the cooking time.
3. In a large nonstick skillet over moderate heat, saute garlic cloves and hot pepper flakes.
4. When garlic barely begins to color, add cherry tomatoes and season lightly with sea salt.
5. Cook tomatoes over high heat until they lose their shape.
6. Drain spaghetti; return it to the pot.
7. Add 1 cup of pasta cooking water to the skillet.
8. Stir frequently to combine tomatoes and pasta, completing the sauce's cooking.
9. If needed, add more pasta water to prevent a dry sauce.
10. Sprinkle with chopped basil before serving.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
